calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-22-2004 Continued To Dec-27-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-27-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on as re-assigned by the Master Calendar Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing/Court Trial this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Jonathan Bornstein, Esq. for Plaintiff: Richard J. Bocci Realty.
Plaintiff's wintess: Richard J. Bocci, present, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Taylor James Ray.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Taylor James Ray as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 600 Excelsior St., San Francisco.
Rent and Per Diem Damages of $10,259.86
No Attorney's Fees.
Costs $254.60, for a total of $10,514.46
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-27-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-22-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: JONATHAN BORNSTEIN FOR PLAINTIFF RICHARD J BOCCI REALTY
NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT TAYLOR JAMES RAY

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE OFF CALENDAR. JURY DEMAND STRICKEN. TO PROCEED AS COURT TRIAL.
